summary: The user is seeking to improve their overall fitness through home exercises and is tracking their progress with a Fitbit Charge 3. They are also looking for apps to monitor their blood sugar levels and food intake, ultimately deciding to try the One Drop app for its integration with their Contour Next blood glucose monitor.
facts: The user has been using a Fitbit Charge 3 for 3 months to track their fitness progress. The user is tracking their blood sugar levels with a Contour Next blood glucose monitor. The user plans to use the One Drop app to integrate their glucose data and track their food intake and activity. The user is interested in improving their overall fitness through home exercises. The user is looking for apps that can help them monitor their blood sugar levels and food intake. The user has expressed excitement about exploring the features of the One Drop app.
